title: Publish @beskid/ui-react (settings export) to GitHub Packages
body:
Publish `@cyber-nomad-collective/beskid-ui-react` with `./settings` export so tracker Docker builds resolve from GitHub Packages without Vite local alias.

## Landed

- `./settings` export in [`package.json`](beskid_web_common/packages/beskid-ui-react/package.json)
- Publish steps documented in package README
- Tracker uses `npm:@cyber-nomad-collective/beskid-ui-react@^0.2.0` alias

## Remaining

- CI publish with `NODE_AUTH_TOKEN` (or manual publish) and `scripts/sync-beskid-packages.sh` on consumers
- `container-images` tracker matrix green without local alias

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `web-auth-web-common`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`
